creator: ardovm@yahoo.it
text:
The port devel/xdg-utils contains the script /usr/local/bin/xdg-screensaver

That script depends on a program named "dcop", but the port does not depend on any other port that installs it.

How-To-Repeat: Running under KDE 4.10.5, all installed ports up to date.

$ xdg-screensaver status
/usr/local/bin/xdg-screensaver: dcop: not found
ERROR:  kdesktop KScreensaverIface isEnabled returned ''
